headline: Truist Sees Strong Growth Ahead for Salesforce (CRM), Keeps Buy Rating
summary: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the 10 Unrivaled Stocks of the Next 5 Years. On April 10, Truist Securities reaffirmed its Buy rating on Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) with a price target of $280 on the stock. The research firm pointed to a credible path for Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) to speed up its growth in […]

headline: AI’s next act: how Salesforce is turning efficiency gains into revenue
summary: Salesforce used AI agents to cut $100 million in support costs and handle 3 million customer conversations. Now it's deploying that tech for other things.

headline: Tech Divergence: Chips Soar, Software Weak - Will It Continue?
summary: Chip stocks like AMD and TSM soar while software giants ADBE and CRM lag due to AI threats and single-digit multiples. See why oversold software names could lead next.

headline: AI Coding Startup Cursor Set For $2 Billion Funding Round, Nearly Doubling Valuation With Nvidia Backing: Report
summary: AI coding startup Cursor is reportedly close to raising $2 billion at a $50 billion valuation, backed by major venture and tech firms.

headline: Is Salesforce (CRM) Now An Opportunity After Its 28.2% Year To Date Share Price Decline?
summary: If you are wondering whether Salesforce at around US$182 per share looks cheap or expensive today, the answer depends on which valuation lens you use. The stock has moved sharply in the short term, with a 10.4% gain over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return is a 6.3% decline and the year to date return sits at a 28.2% decline, contributing to a 25.8% decline over the past year. Recent attention on Salesforce has focused on broader questions about large software companies, including...
